runTranscriptUxLab.title: Run Transcript Fixtures
runTranscriptUxLab.description: Built from a real Paperclip development run, then sanitized so no secrets, local paths, or environment details survive into the fixture.
runTranscriptUxLab.surfaces.detail.label: Run Detail
runTranscriptUxLab.surfaces.detail.descr: The long-form run page with the `Nice | Raw` toggle and the most inspectable transcript view.
runTranscriptUxLab.surfaces.live.label: Issue Widget
runTranscriptUxLab.surfaces.live.descrip: The issue-detail live run widget, optimized for following an active run without leaving the task page.
runTranscriptUxLab.surfaces.dashboard.de: The active-agents dashboard card, tuned for compact scanning while keeping the same transcript language.
runTranscriptUxLab.liveWidget.title: Live Runs
runTranscriptUxLab.liveWidget.descriptio: Compact live transcript stream for the issue detail page.
issueChatUxLab.title: Issue chat review surface
issueChatUxLab.description: This page exercises the real assistant-ui issue chat with fixture-backed messages. Use it to review spacing, chronology, running states, tool rendering, activity rows, queueing, and composer behavior without needing a live issue in progress.
issueChatUxLab.highlights.runningReplies: Running assistant replies with streamed text, reasoning, tool cards, and background status notes
issueChatUxLab.highlights.historicalEven: Historical issue events and linked runs rendered inline with the chat timeline
issueChatUxLab.highlights.queuedMessages: Queued user messages, settled assistant comments, and feedback controls
issueChatUxLab.highlights.submittingBubb: Submitting (pending) message bubble with Sending... label and reduced opacity
issueChatUxLab.highlights.emptyStates: Empty and disabled-composer states without relying on live backend data
issueChatUxLab.sections.animation.title: Rotating reasoning text
issueChatUxLab.sections.animation.descri: Isolated ticker that cycles sample reasoning lines on a timer. The outgoing line slides up and fades out while the incoming line slides up from below. Runs in a loop so you can tune timing and easing without needing a live stream.
issueChatUxLab.sections.statusTokens.des: The "Working" token uses the shimmer-text gradient sweep to signal an active run. Once the run completes it becomes the static "Worked" token.
issueChatUxLab.sections.primaryPreview.d: Shows the fully active state: timeline events, historical run marker, a running assistant reply with reasoning and tools, and a queued follow-up from the user.
issueChatUxLab.sections.submitting.title: Pending message bubble
issueChatUxLab.sections.submitting.descr: When a user sends a message, the bubble briefly shows a "Sending..." label at reduced opacity until the server confirms receipt. This preview renders that transient state.
issueChatUxLab.sections.settledReview.de: Shows the post-run state: assistant comment feedback controls, historical run context, and timeline reassignment without any active stream.
issueChatUxLab.sections.emptyThread.desc: Keeps the message area visible even when there is no thread yet, and replaces the composer with an explicit warning when replies are blocked.
issueChatUxLab.sections.emptyThread.comp: This workspace is closed, so new chat replies are disabled until the issue is reopened.
issueChatUxLab.sections.checklist.title: What to evaluate on this page
issueChatUxLab.sections.checklist.descri: This route should be the fastest way to inspect the chat system before or after tweaks.
issueChatUxLab.sections.checklist.messag: Check that user, assistant, and system rows scan differently without feeling like separate products.
issueChatUxLab.sections.checklist.stream: Watch the live preview for reasoning density, tool expansion behavior, and queued follow-up readability.
issueChatUxLab.reasoning.line1: Analyzing the user's request about the animation smoothness...
issueChatUxLab.reasoning.line2: The current implementation unmounts the old span instantly, causing a flash...
issueChatUxLab.reasoning.line3: Looking at the CSS keyframes for cot-line-slide-up...
issueChatUxLab.reasoning.line4: We need a paired exit animation so the old line slides out while the new one slides in...
issueChatUxLab.reasoning.line5: Implementing a two-span ticker: exiting line goes up and out, entering line comes up from below...

projectWorkspaceDetail.header.descriptio: Configure the concrete workspace Paperclip attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.
projectWorkspaceDetail.header.primaryDes: This is the project’s primary codebase workspace.
projectWorkspaceDetail.sourceTypes.local: A local path Paperclip can use directly.
A local folder without git semantics.
projectWorkspaceDetail.sourceTypes.remot: A repo URL with optional refs and local checkout.
A hosted workspace tracked by external reference.
projectWorkspaceDetail.fields.setupComma: Runs when this workspace needs custom bootstrap
projectWorkspaceDetail.fields.cleanupCom: Runs before project-level execution workspace teardown
projectWorkspaceDetail.fields.runtimeSer: Default runtime services for this workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they set an override. If you do not know the commands yet, ask your CEO to configure them for you.
projectWorkspaceDetail.runtime.title: Attached services
projectWorkspaceDetail.runtime.descripti: Shared services for this project workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
projectWorkspaceDetail.empty.notFound: Workspace not found for this project.
projectWorkspaceDetail.errors.runtimeSer: Runtime services JSON must be a JSON object.
projectWorkspaceDetail.errors.remoteMana: Remote-managed workspaces require a remote workspace ref or repo URL.
projectWorkspaceDetail.errors.workspaceR: Workspace requires at least one local path or repo URL.
projectWorkspaceDetail.errors.localPathM: Local workspace path must be absolute.
projectWorkspaceDetail.errors.repoUrlMus: Repo URL must be a valid URL.
projectWorkspaceDetail.runtime.empty.noR: No runtime services are currently running for this workspace.
projectWorkspaceDetail.runtime.empty.noD: No runtime-service default is configured for this workspace yet.
projectWorkspaceDetail.runtime.empty.noJ: No one-shot jobs are configured for this workspace yet.
projectWorkspaceDetail.runtime.disabledH: Project workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.
projectWorkspaceDetail.runtime.commandsD: Long-running services stay supervised here, while one-shot jobs run on demand against this workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
projectWorkspaceDetail.runtime.advancedJ: Paperclip derives Services and Jobs from this JSON. Prefer editing named commands first; use raw JSON for advanced lifecycle, port, readiness, or environment settings.
projectWorkspaceDetail.fields.runtimeCom: Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it. Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.
executionWorkspaceDetail.header.descript: Configure the concrete runtime workspace that Paperclip reuses for this issue flow.

These settings stay attached to the execution workspace so future runs can keep local paths, repo refs, provisioning, teardown, and runtime-service behavior in sync with the actual workspace being reused.
executionWorkspaceDetail.configuration.d: Edit the concrete path, repo, branch, provisioning, teardown, and runtime overrides attached to this execution workspace.
executionWorkspaceDetail.fields.provisio: Runs when Paperclip prepares this execution workspace
executionWorkspaceDetail.fields.teardown: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
executionWorkspaceDetail.fields.runtimeS: Concrete workspace runtime settings for this execution workspace. Leave this inheriting unless you need a one-off override. If you are missing the right commands, ask your CEO to set them up for you.
executionWorkspaceDetail.runtimeConfigSo: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.
This execution workspace is inheriting the project workspace runtime config.
No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
executionWorkspaceDetail.runtime.title: Attached services
executionWorkspaceDetail.runtime.advance: Concrete workspace runtime settings for this execution workspace. Leave this inheriting unless you need a one-off override. If you are missing the right commands, ask your CEO to set them up for you.
executionWorkspaceDetail.fields.runtimeC: Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.
executionWorkspaceDetail.runtime.empty.n: No runtime services are currently running for this execution workspace.
No runtime config is defined for this execution workspace yet.
No one-shot jobs are configured for this execution workspace yet.
executionWorkspaceDetail.runtime.disable: Execution workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.
executionWorkspaceDetail.operations.empt: No workspace operations have been recorded yet.
executionWorkspaceDetail.errors.workspac: Workspace runtime JSON must be a JSON object.
executionWorkspaceDetail.errors.repoUrlM: Repo URL must be a valid URL.

routines.advanced.concurrency.descriptio: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.

agentDetail.prompts.mode.help: Managed: Paperclip stores and serves the instructions bundle. External: you provide a path on disk where the instructions live.
agentDetail.prompts.rootPath.label: Root path

instanceGeneral.title: General
instanceGeneral.subtitle: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
instanceGeneral.locale.title: Language
instanceGeneral.locale.description: Choose the UI language for this browser. Missing translations fall back to English.
instanceGeneral.censor.title: Censor username in logs
instanceGeneral.censor.description: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
instanceGeneral.shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
instanceGeneral.shortcuts.description: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
instanceGeneral.backup.title: Backup retention
instanceGeneral.backup.description: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.
instanceGeneral.feedback.title: AI feedback sharing
instanceGeneral.feedback.description: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
instanceGeneral.feedback.prompt: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
instanceGeneral.feedback.option.notAllow: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
instanceGeneral.feedback.help.full: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the {{preferenceKey}} key from the {{settingsTable}} JSON row for this instance, or set it back to {{promptValue}}. Unset and {{promptValue}} both mean no default has been chosen yet.
instanceGeneral.signOut.title: Sign out
instanceGeneral.signOut.description: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

instanceExperimental.title: Experimental
instanceExperimental.subtitle: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
instanceExperimental.isolated.title: Enable Isolated Workspaces
instanceExperimental.isolated.descriptio: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
instanceExperimental.autoRestart.title: Auto-Restart Dev Server When Idle
instanceExperimental.autoRestart.descrip: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.

adapterManager.reinstall.description: This will pull the latest version of {{packageName}} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.
